headline: At least 9 oil tankers have been attacked in the Strait of Hormuz since July 6.
context: Insurers now refuse coverage for vessels transiting the chokepoint that carries roughly a fifth of global oil supply, and Brent has climbed near $94.

headline: June core CPI cooled to 2.6% year-over-year, undershooting the 2.9% forecast.
context: Core prices were flat for the month, the softest reading outside a recession since 2017, ahead of the Fed's July 29 decision.
source: Source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics via CNBC, Jun 2026 CPI report, published Jul 14, 2026

headline: Three setups scoring above 55 today, spanning industrials, AI infrastructure, and energy.

items.reason: Q2 EPS beat by over 10% on record rental revenue; shares jumped 10% and full-year guidance was raised. Opportunity score: 76/100.
Disclosed a record $60B AI order backlog and raised gross-margin guidance to 15%-17% from 8.2%-8.4%; shares rose as much as 27%. Opportunity score: 74/100.
Low leverage and a $20B buyback position it to benefit as Hormuz-driven supply risk keeps crude elevated. Opportunity score: 62/100.

source: Source: Company filings, StockStory, and OilPrice.com, Jul 21-22, 2026

headline: Consumer sentiment jumped to 54.4 in July, the best reading since February.
context: Most survey interviews wrapped before U.S. strikes on Iran resumed July 7; sentiment still sits about 12% below year-ago levels.
source: Source: University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers, preliminary Jul 2026, published Jul 17, 2026

headline: Roth accounts captured 67% of all IRA contributions in Q1, a new high.
context: Total IRA contributions rose a record 29% year-over-year, and Roth conversions jumped 41%, per Fidelity's latest retirement data.
source: Source: Fidelity Investments Q1 2026 Retirement Analysis, published May 28, 2026
